data.content: I'll start `dotnet watch test` so your tests re-run automatically whenever you save a file.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Start dotnet watch test for hot reload

data.reasoningText:
The user wants to use `dotnet watch test` for hot reload. This is an MSTest project targeting .NET 8.0. I can start `dotnet watch test` in async mode so they can iterate on the code while seeing test results automatically.

Let me start it up.
